facts.shortSummary: Omens worsen around the Great Chasm, the first investigators vanish, and the party is swept through a white storm while clutching what gear they can keep.
facts.longSummary: The session opens with a prologue about the Great Chasm's escalating signs and the disappearance of the Vejo Vaikai investigation party sent with Kemeko warriors. The beat then shifts into the fall itself, as the adventurers are torn through a blinding white storm and forced to decide what belongings they can hold onto before landing somewhere unknown.

location.context: swept by unnatural storm into darkness below
location.notes: The beat covers the omens over the chasm and the fall before the party awakens on the platform.

npcs.name: Zeyfa
npcs.context: cruel west wind of Zimkovan legend
npcs.notes: Many people interpret the worsening omens around the chasm as signs of Zeyfa's anger.

npcs.name: Kalima
npcs.context: terrified Zimkovan woman caught in the fall
npcs.notes: Jrain tries to hold onto the woman as the storm carries everyone away.

organizations.name: Kemeko Monastery
organizations.notes: Its kenku are described as seeing the chasm as refuge and sending warriors with the investigation.

organizations.name: Vejo Vaikai
organizations.notes: Their mystics view the chasm as a place of elemental balance and send the missing expedition.

facts.shortSummary: The party awakens on a floating ice platform, meets one another, and begins questioning the terrified woman before Eolo triggers the guardians.
facts.longSummary: The adventurers come to on an ice platform suspended in blackness beneath a howling white storm, with two frozen wolf figures guarding narrow bridges. They introduce themselves, get their first look at the terrified Zimkovan woman, and realize the place feels wrong even to Ekko, who knows the chasm well; the beat ends when Eolo approaches one of the wolves and sets the fight in motion.

location.context: floating ice platform between two bridges
location.notes: The name is not learned until later, but this is the same platform Kalima later identifies as part of the labyrinth.

npcs.name: Kalima
npcs.notes: Finnan calms her briefly with Old Zimkovan magic, but she remains frightened and hard to question.

facts.shortSummary: Eolo wakes the frozen wolf guardians, and the party scrambles into its first desperate exchange on the slick platform.
facts.longSummary: Combat begins when Eolo approaches the nearest wolf and both frozen guardians come to life. The first phase centers on the wolves' violent opening rush, Eolo being knocked down and mauled, and the party finding its footing as Ekko takes bear form and the others begin to coordinate under pressure.

location.context: ice platform at the bridge mouths
location.notes: The opening exchange of the fight stays on the same exposed platform.

npcs.name: Kalima
npcs.notes: She remains on the platform while the fight erupts around her.

mainEnemies.name: ice wolf guardians
mainEnemies.notes: Two frozen wolf guardians animate and launch the encounter.

combat.notes: The beat covers the wolves' opening assault and ends as the first wind-shade joins the battle.

facts.shortSummary: The battle widens as wind-shades shriek across the platform, Kalima collapses, and the first chasm wisps burst from the shattered wolves.
facts.longSummary: The fight escalates when multiple wind-shades blow in from off the platform, battering the party with shrieking gusts while one of the remaining wolves keeps pressure on the front line. Kalima is dropped unconscious in the chaos, darkness begins to matter more, and the first chasm wisps appear as the wolves break apart.

location.context: same floating platform amid blowing darkness
location.notes: This phase remains centered on the platform as new enemies enter from the surrounding void.

npcs.name: Kalima
npcs.notes: She collapses unconscious when the shades' shriek tears through the platform.

mainEnemies.name: wind-shades
mainEnemies.notes: They gust in from beyond the platform and become the new central threat.

mainEnemies.name: ice wolf guardians
mainEnemies.notes: At least one wolf remains active through this phase.

mainEnemies.name: chasm wisps
mainEnemies.notes: The first wisps emerge from the broken wolves near the end of the beat.

combat.notes: The middle phase is defined by the shades' arrival, Kalima going down, and the fight becoming more chaotic and light-starved.

facts.shortSummary: In darkness and drifting ice, the party revives Kalima and cleans up the last wolf, shades, and wisps on the platform.
facts.longSummary: The final phase of the combat is a running cleanup under bad visibility, with Finnan healing Kalima back onto her feet while the others finish off the last wolf, hunt the shades, and swat down the remaining wisps. The platform finally falls quiet after the last enemies are destroyed and the immediate danger passes.

location.context: darkened ice platform after the wolves shatter
location.notes: The fight never leaves the platform, even as the action spreads toward its edges.

npcs.name: Kalima
npcs.notes: Finnan uses healing magic to bring her back during the last stretch of the battle.

mainEnemies.name: ice wolf guardians
mainEnemies.notes: The last active wolf is finished during this beat.

mainEnemies.name: wind-shades
mainEnemies.notes: The remaining shades try to push Finnan over the edge before being cut down.

mainEnemies.name: chasm wisps
mainEnemies.notes: The last wisps are picked off as the combat winds down.

combat.notes: This beat covers the close of the encounter and the platform becoming temporarily safe again.

facts.shortSummary: With the fight over, Kalima names Zeyfa's Labyrinth, describes her people's old flight into it, and warns that only the beast offers any hope of escape.
facts.longSummary: Finnan and Justas use the brief calm after the battle to draw a fuller account from the woman, who says they are back in Zeyfa's Labyrinth and that her people came here long ago to hide from a cataclysm. She insists that no one escapes, that the only way out is further in toward the beast, and that ordinary prayers do not carry here, though Justas steadies her with Romil's token and its light.

location.notes: The group remains on the platform while Kalima gives her first coherent explanation of the place.

npcs.name: Kalima
npcs.notes: She explains that they are back in the labyrinth and that the beast is tied to any chance of escape.

npcs.name: Zeyfa
npcs.notes: Kalima identifies the labyrinth as Zeyfa's domain and frames it as a place of demanded appeasement.

items.name: Romil's token
items.notes: Justas places a glacial token of Romil in Kalima's hands and later makes it glow to reassure her.

organizations.name: Kestavo
organizations.notes: Kalima insists the Kestavo cannot hear prayers here, while Justas argues their reach is not wholly absent.

facts.shortSummary: The party trades introductions, explains why each of them was near the chasm, and compares what they know about Kalima, Kemeko, the missing expedition, and the strange place around them.
facts.longSummary: Once Kalima is a little calmer, the conversation turns outward as the companions finally introduce themselves properly and lay out their reasons for being near the Great Chasm. Jrain explains the missing expedition she was tracking, Ekko connects himself to Eidrikas and the Vejo Vaikai, and the group compares what it knows about Kemeko, the Kestavo, and whether this place is truly the chasm at all.

location.context: same platform during a long conversation
location.notes: The group stays on the platform while turning from Kalima's testimony to their own stories and theories.

npcs.name: Kalima
npcs.notes: She remains nearby while the party explains what they have learned and who they are.

npcs.name: Eidrikas
npcs.notes: Jrain identifies him as part of the vanished investigation party.

npcs.name: Pakrinek
npcs.notes: Jrain names Pakrinek as one of the investigators who disappeared with Eidrikas.

organizations.name: Vejo Vaikai
organizations.notes: Their missing expedition becomes a central reason for Jrain's and Ekko's concern.

organizations.name: Kemeko Monastery
organizations.notes: The party compares its public reputation with Ekko's account of it as a disciplined kenku stronghold.

organizations.name: Kestavo
organizations.notes: Justas and Ekko discuss the local small-gods tradition and its relation to Zeyfa and the chasm.

facts.shortSummary: The group questions Kalima a little further, takes a short rest, tests the platform's exits, scouts the bridge ahead, and commits to entering the tunnels with her.
facts.longSummary: The party spends a little more time asking Kalima about sacrifice and the beast, then settles into a short rest while Finnan checks for magic and the storm above grows more threatening. They probe both the bridges and the void below, learn that the updraft makes flying down impossible, send Rala to scout the far side, and finally persuade Kalima to come between Finnan and Justas as they jump into the snowbank and choose the maze's tunnels.

location.context: ice platform, bridge ends, and snow-chamber entrance
location.notes: The beat begins on the platform and ends with the party committing to the first chamber of the labyrinth.

npcs.name: Kalima
npcs.notes: She warns that the beast does not like waiting, says all paths lead toward it, and agrees to come only if kept between Finnan and Justas.
